name: browser-info-extraction
citations: friction: initial page-text extraction failed to capture email rows, requiring dom-query fallbacks
friction: excel online rendered as canvas/iframe unreadable by text tools, forcing a long detour through download attempts and computer-use
friction: download blocked by safety filter and window focus tangled between two brave windows
friction: stated wrong letter grade initially (a instead of a+)
pattern: fell back across multiple tool tiers (page-text -> JS DOM -> computer-use screenshot -> extension scroll/zoom) when each was blocked
pattern: asked for student ID before locating the row instead of guessing
pattern: verified the grade by re-computing with the instructor's formula
pattern: self-corrected the grading-scale error (A -> A+) when the user questioned it
